summary: Completed testing of deleted users fix and new super_admin role. All 7 users created and login working. Settings page shows all roles correctly. Employees, Smart Reports, and WooCommerce pages functional. Fixed get_admin_user function to include super_admin role.

passed_tests.details: Table displays all 7 users with correct names, emails, and role badges
All roles shown: سوبر أدمين (purple), مدير (red), مشرف (blue), مشرف مبيعات (teal), بائع (green), مدير مخزون (orange), محاسب (yellow)
Each user row has Edit, Permissions, Password, and Delete action buttons
Page loads with data-testid='employees-page', 5 stats cards, salary schedule button, add employee button
Shows: الموظفين (0), إجمالي الرواتب (0 دج), العمولات (0 دج), السلف (0 دج), حسابات نشطة (0)
جدول الرواتب button visible and clickable
Page loads with data-testid='smart-reports-page', tabs for الإعدادات/السجل/المعاينة
Page loads with data-testid='woocommerce-page', تفعيل التكامل toggle, API settings section

passed_tests.feature: Super Admin sidebar shows NT Commerce
passed_tests.details: NT COMMERCE section visible in sidebar only for super_admin role
All sections visible: إدارة الموظفين, WOOCOMMERCE, التوصيل, الإدارة, etc.
Fixed server.py line 1098 to allow super_admin role access to admin endpoints like /api/users

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Line 1098: Fixed get_admin_user to include super_admin role

success_rate.backend: 100% (All 7 users login working, API endpoints accessible)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly, UI elements verified)

seed_data_creation: 7 users created in test_database with roles: super_admin, admin, manager, sales_supervisor, seller, inventory_manager, accountant
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 users working correctly. Fixed get_admin_user function in server.py to allow super_admin role access to admin-protected endpoints. Settings page shows all users with correct role badges. Employees page has 5 statistics cards (الموظفين, إجمالي الرواتب, العمولات, السلف, حسابات نشطة) and salary schedule button. Smart Reports page has 3 tabs and AI tips toggles. WooCommerce page has API settings. Super Admin sees NT COMMERCE section in sidebar.

bug_fixed.description: get_admin_user function only allowed admin role, not super_admin
